originalTitle: Popular tech stock surges after new data center announcement
summary: Shares of Galaxy Digital (NASDAQ: GLXY) surged higher on June 8 after CEO Mike Novogratz detailed the firm's AI data center plans over the weekend. Galaxy Digital is a diversified financial services and infrastructure firm founded by former Goldman Sachs partner Novogratz in 2018, listed on ...

chineseTitle: 新数据中心宣布后，热门科技股飙升
chineseSummary: Galaxy Digital（纳斯达克股票代码：GLXY）首席执行官 Mike Novogratz 在周末详细介绍了该公司的人工智能数据中心计划后，6 月 8 日股价飙升。 Galaxy Digital 是一家多元化金融服务和基础设施公司，由前高盛合伙人 Novogratz 于 2018 年创立，在...

whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
